body:
Leo, great catching up with you briefly at [Climate Week](events/climate-week-2026) last week — always too short, but good to see familiar faces in the room. I wanted to follow up on the conversation we started about co-investing at the seed stage in AI-enabled grid infrastructure; we've been seeing a real uptick in quality deal flow there over the past quarter and I think there's a natural overlap with what [Benchmark](orgs/benchmark) has been tracking on the energy transition side. A few of the companies in our current pipeline would likely benefit from having you in the round given your platform's operational resources, and frankly I'd rather build that trust early than show up cold when a Series A is already oversubscribed. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next two weeks to dig into specifics? Happy to share a couple of anonymized one-pagers in advance so we're not starting from scratch on the call.

Amara
